snapshot_target: OCC B-F3 trade_pnl rebuild — daily OHLC substrate
source_query: SELECT ticker, trade_date, close_price FROM ro_khanna.daily_ohlc WHERE close_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ticker, trade_date
substrate_authoritative_note: Daily close prices for 42 tickers covering Khanna's in-scope sectors (Defense Primes, Defense Tech, Big Tech, Pharma, Healthcare Devices/Services) plus SPY benchmark. Pulled from yfinance into ro_khanna.daily_ohlc by scripts/k_ro_khanna_s8b_03_fetch_ohlc.py at the time of the F225 / F820 / F833 derivation. Bundling the OHLC snapshot here isolates the rebuild from yfinance price drift (split adjustments rewrite historical prices retroactively) — the reviewer can BIT-EXACT verify the F225 $63.69M household terminal P&L against the same OHLC inputs that produced it. Reviewers who want to cross-check this snapshot against today's yfinance state can re-fetch the same (ticker, date_range) tuples and diff.
